preconditions: I can only activate a shift slot A if it is not the case that A is active and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I activate a shift slot A, it is the case that A is active

assign_nurse_to_slot.description: assign a nurse candidate B to a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only assign a nurse candidate B to a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and the shift slot A is compatible with the nurse candidate B
I can only assign a nurse candidate B to a shift slot A if it is not the case that A has a pending assignment
effects: Once I assign a nurse candidate B to a shift slot A, it is the case that A is assigned to B and A has a pending assignment
Once I assign a nurse candidate B to a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_nurse_from_slot.description: unassign a nurse candidate B from a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only unassign a nurse candidate B from a shift slot A if it is the case that A is assigned to B
I can only unassign a nurse candidate B from a shift slot A if it is not the case that the clinical role is scheduled for A and it is not the case that the competency is certified for A
effects: Once I unassign a nurse candidate B from a shift slot A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a nurse candidate B from a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that A has a pending assignment and it is not the case anymore that A has a confirmed orientation and it is not the case anymore that A has verified competency and it is not the case anymore that the supervisor is engaged in A and it is not the case anymore that certification is granted for A and it is not the case anymore that a follow up is required for A

reserve_orientation_for_slot.description: reserve an orientation session B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve an orientation session B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and the orientation session B is available
effects: Once I reserve an orientation session B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A is reserved for the orientation session B
Once I reserve an orientation session B for a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the orientation session B is available

release_orientation_for_slot.description: release an orientation session B from a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only release an orientation session B from a shift slot A if it is the case that A is reserved for the orientation session B
effects: Once I release an orientation session B from a shift slot A, it is the case that the orientation session B is available
Once I release an orientation session B from a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for the orientation session B

confirm_orientation_completion.description: confirm completion of an orientation session B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only confirm completion of an orientation session B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and A has a pending assignment and A is reserved for the orientation session B
I can only confirm completion of an orientation session B for a shift slot A if it is not the case that A has a confirmed orientation
effects: Once I confirm completion of an orientation session B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A has a confirmed orientation

engage_clinical_supervisor_for_slot.description: engage a clinical supervisor B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only engage a clinical supervisor B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and A has a pending assignment and the clinical supervisor B is available
I can only engage a clinical supervisor B for a shift slot A if it is not the case that A has a confirmed orientation
effects: Once I engage a clinical supervisor B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A has a confirmed orientation and the supervisor is engaged in A
Once I engage a clinical supervisor B for a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the clinical supervisor B is available

trainer_verify_competency.description: trainer a trainer C verify competency for a shift slot A during an orientation session B
preconditions: I can only trainer a trainer C verify competency for a shift slot A during an orientation session B if it is the case that A has a confirmed orientation and A has a pending assignment and A is reserved for the orientation session B and the trainer C is available
I can only trainer a trainer C verify competency for a shift slot A during an orientation session B if it is not the case that A has verified competency
effects: Once I trainer a trainer C verify competency for a shift slot A during an orientation session B, it is the case that A has verified competency
Once I trainer a trainer C verify competency for a shift slot A during an orientation session B, it is not the case anymore that the supervisor is engaged in A

verify_competency_with_document.description: verify competency for a shift slot A with an approval document type B
preconditions: I can only verify competency for a shift slot A with an approval document type B if it is the case that A has a pending assignment and a document of type B is linked to A
I can only verify competency for a shift slot A with an approval document type B if it is not the case that A has verified competency
effects: Once I verify competency for a shift slot A with an approval document type B, it is the case that A has verified competency
Once I verify competency for a shift slot A with an approval document type B, it is not the case anymore that the supervisor is engaged in A

reserve_specialty_for_slot.description: reserve a specialty skill B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specialty skill B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and the specialty skill B is available and the shift slot A requires the specialty skill B
effects: Once I reserve a specialty skill B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A is reserved for the specialty skill B
Once I reserve a specialty skill B for a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the specialty skill B is available

release_specialty_from_slot.description: release a specialty skill B from a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only release a specialty skill B from a shift slot A if it is the case that A is reserved for the specialty skill B
effects: Once I release a specialty skill B from a shift slot A, it is the case that the specialty skill B is available
Once I release a specialty skill B from a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for the specialty skill B

reserve_support_skill_for_slot.description: reserve a support skill B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a support skill B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and the support skill B is available and the shift slot A requires the support skill B
effects: Once I reserve a support skill B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A is reserved for the support skill B
Once I reserve a support skill B for a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the support skill B is available

release_support_skill_from_slot.description: release a support skill B from a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only release a support skill B from a shift slot A if it is the case that A is reserved for the support skill B
effects: Once I release a support skill B from a shift slot A, it is the case that the support skill B is available
Once I release a support skill B from a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for the support skill B

reserve_technical_skill_for_slot.description: reserve a technical skill B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a technical skill B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and the technical skill B is available and the shift slot A requires the technical skill B
effects: Once I reserve a technical skill B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A is reserved for the technical skill B
Once I reserve a technical skill B for a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the technical skill B is available

release_technical_skill_from_slot.description: release a technical skill B from a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only release a technical skill B from a shift slot A if it is the case that A is reserved for the technical skill B
effects: Once I release a technical skill B from a shift slot A, it is the case that the technical skill B is available
Once I release a technical skill B from a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for the technical skill B

reserve_credential_for_slot.description: reserve a credential B for a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a credential B for a shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and the credential B is available and the shift slot A requires the credential B
effects: Once I reserve a credential B for a shift slot A, it is the case that A is reserved for the credential B
Once I reserve a credential B for a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the credential B is available

release_credential_from_slot.description: release a credential B from a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only release a credential B from a shift slot A if it is the case that A is reserved for the credential B
effects: Once I release a credential B from a shift slot A, it is the case that the credential B is available
Once I release a credential B from a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for the credential B

schedule_clinical_role_for_slot.description: schedule a clinical role B for a shift slot A with a specialty skill C and a support skill D
preconditions: I can only schedule a clinical role B for a shift slot A with a specialty skill C and a support skill D if it is the case that A has a pending assignment and A is reserved for the specialty skill C and A is reserved for the support skill D and the clinical role B is available and the shift slot A requires the clinical role B
I can only schedule a clinical role B for a shift slot A with a specialty skill C and a support skill D if it is not the case that the clinical role is scheduled for A
effects: Once I schedule a clinical role B for a shift slot A with a specialty skill C and a support skill D, it is the case that A is assigned to the clinical role B and the clinical role is scheduled for A
Once I schedule a clinical role B for a shift slot A with a specialty skill C and a support skill D, it is not the case anymore that the clinical role B is available

schedule_clinical_role_with_equipment.description: schedule a clinical role B with a special equipment D for a shift slot A requiring a technical skill C
preconditions: I can only schedule a clinical role B with a special equipment D for a shift slot A requiring a technical skill C if it is the case that A has a pending assignment and A is reserved for the technical skill C and the special equipment D is available and the clinical role B is available and the shift slot A requires the clinical role B and the shift slot A requires the special equipment D
I can only schedule a clinical role B with a special equipment D for a shift slot A requiring a technical skill C if it is not the case that the clinical role is scheduled for A
effects: Once I schedule a clinical role B with a special equipment D for a shift slot A requiring a technical skill C, it is the case that A is assigned to the clinical role B and the clinical role is scheduled for A and a follow up is required for A and the supervisor is engaged in A

Once I schedule a clinical role B with a special equipment D for a shift slot A requiring a technical skill C, it is not the case anymore that the clinical role B is available and it is not the case anymore that the special equipment D is available

clear_followup_and_supervisor_flags.description: clear follow up and supervisor flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C
preconditions: I can only clear follow up and supervisor flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C if it is the case that the clinical role is scheduled for A and a follow up is required for A and A is reserved for the specialty skill B and A is reserved for the support skill C
effects: Once I clear follow up and supervisor flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C, it is not the case anymore that a follow up is required for A and it is not the case anymore that the supervisor is engaged in A

approve_competency_by_preceptor.description: approve competency for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B, a support skill C, and a preceptor role D
preconditions: I can only approve competency for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B, a support skill C, and a preceptor role D if it is the case that A has verified competency and the clinical role is scheduled for A and A is reserved for the specialty skill B and A is reserved for the support skill C and the shift slot A has the staff role group D

I can only approve competency for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B, a support skill C, and a preceptor role D if it is not the case that the supervisor is engaged in A and it is not the case that the competency is certified for A
effects: Once I approve competency for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B, a support skill C, and a preceptor role D, it is the case that the competency is certified for A

approve_competency_by_mentor.description: approve competency for a shift slot A with a technical skill B, a credential C, and a mentor role D
preconditions: I can only approve competency for a shift slot A with a technical skill B, a credential C, and a mentor role D if it is the case that A has verified competency and the clinical role is scheduled for A and A is reserved for the technical skill B and A is reserved for the credential C and the shift slot A has the staff role group D
I can only approve competency for a shift slot A with a technical skill B, a credential C, and a mentor role D if it is not the case that the competency is certified for A
effects: Once I approve competency for a shift slot A with a technical skill B, a credential C, and a mentor role D, it is the case that the competency is certified for A and the supervisor is engaged in A

grant_certification_and_clear_transient_.description: grant certification and clear transient flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C
preconditions: I can only grant certification and clear transient flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C if it is the case that the competency is certified for A and the supervisor is engaged in A and A is reserved for the specialty skill B and A is reserved for the support skill C
effects: Once I grant certification and clear transient flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C, it is the case that certification is granted for A

Once I grant certification and clear transient flags for a shift slot A with a specialty skill B and a support skill C, it is not the case anymore that the supervisor is engaged in A and it is not the case anymore that A has verified competency and it is not the case anymore that a follow up is required for A

perform_requalification_with_trainer.description: perform requalification with a trainer C for a shift slot A during an orientation session B
preconditions: I can only perform requalification with a trainer C for a shift slot A during an orientation session B if it is the case that certification is granted for A and the competency is certified for A and A has a pending assignment and A is reserved for the orientation session B and the trainer C is available
I can only perform requalification with a trainer C for a shift slot A during an orientation session B if it is not the case that A has verified competency
effects: Once I perform requalification with a trainer C for a shift slot A during an orientation session B, it is the case that A has verified competency

schedule_requalification_for_orientation.description: schedule requalification for a shift slot A during an orientation session B
preconditions: I can only schedule requalification for a shift slot A during an orientation session B if it is the case that the competency is certified for A and A has verified competency and A is reserved for the orientation session B

I can only schedule requalification for a shift slot A during an orientation session B if it is not the case that the supervisor is engaged in A and it is not the case that requalification is scheduled for A
effects: Once I schedule requalification for a shift slot A during an orientation session B, it is the case that requalification is scheduled for A

schedule_requalification_with_supervisor.description: schedule requalification for a shift slot A with a clinical supervisor B
preconditions: I can only schedule requalification for a shift slot A with a clinical supervisor B if it is the case that the competency is certified for A and A has verified competency and the clinical supervisor B is available

I can only schedule requalification for a shift slot A with a clinical supervisor B if it is not the case that the supervisor is engaged in A and it is not the case that requalification is scheduled for A
effects: Once I schedule requalification for a shift slot A with a clinical supervisor B, it is the case that requalification is scheduled for A
Once I schedule requalification for a shift slot A with a clinical supervisor B, it is not the case anymore that the clinical supervisor B is available

attach_approval_document_to_slot.description: attach an approval document type B to a shift slot A
preconditions: I can only attach an approval document type B to a shift slot A if it is the case that requalification is scheduled for A and the approval document B is available and the document applicability for A is B
effects: Once I attach an approval document type B to a shift slot A, it is the case that the shift slot A is linked to the approval document type B
Once I attach an approval document type B to a shift slot A, it is not the case anymore that the approval document B is available

link_cross_shift_approval_between_shifts.description: link cross shift approval of an approval document type C from a day shift slot B to a night shift slot A
preconditions: I can only link cross shift approval of an approval document type C from a day shift slot B to a night shift slot A if it is the case that A is active and the night shift policy is applicable to A and A requires a document of type C and the shift slot B is linked to the approval document type C
I can only link cross shift approval of an approval document type C from a day shift slot B to a night shift slot A if it is not the case that a document of type C is linked to A
effects: Once I link cross shift approval of an approval document type C from a day shift slot B to a night shift slot A, it is the case that a document of type C is linked to A

mark_followup_completed_for_slot.description: mark follow up as completed for a shift slot A during an orientation session B with a trainer C
preconditions: I can only mark follow up as completed for a shift slot A during an orientation session B with a trainer C if it is the case that A is active and the night shift policy is applicable to A and A has verified competency and requalification is scheduled for A and A is reserved for the orientation session B and the trainer C is available
I can only mark follow up as completed for a shift slot A during an orientation session B with a trainer C if it is not the case that the follow up for A is completed
effects: Once I mark follow up as completed for a shift slot A during an orientation session B with a trainer C, it is the case that the follow up for A is completed

finalize_day_shift_slot_standard.description: finalize a shift slot A for day shift standard
preconditions: I can only finalize a shift slot A for day shift standard if it is the case that the day shift policy is applicable to A and A is active and A has a pending assignment and the clinical role is scheduled for A and the competency is certified for A and requalification is scheduled for A and A has verified competency
I can only finalize a shift slot A for day shift standard if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a shift slot A for day shift standard, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_slot_with_document.description: finalize a shift slot A with an approval document type B for night shift
preconditions: I can only finalize a shift slot A with an approval document type B for night shift if it is the case that the night shift policy is applicable to A and A is active and A has a pending assignment and the clinical role is scheduled for A and the competency is certified for A and requalification is scheduled for A and A has verified competency and a document of type B is linked to A
I can only finalize a shift slot A with an approval document type B for night shift if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a shift slot A with an approval document type B for night shift, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_slot_with_followup.description: finalize a shift slot A with completed follow up for night shift
preconditions: I can only finalize a shift slot A with completed follow up for night shift if it is the case that the night shift policy is applicable to A and A is active and A has a pending assignment and the clinical role is scheduled for A and the competency is certified for A and requalification is scheduled for A and A has verified competency and the follow up for A is completed
I can only finalize a shift slot A with completed follow up for night shift if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a shift slot A with completed follow up for night shift, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.engage_clinical_supervisor_for_slot: engage clinical supervisor {?clinical_supervisor} for shift slot {?shift_slot}
action_nl_templates.trainer_verify_competency: trainer trainer {?trainer} verify competency for shift slot {?shift_slot} during orientation session {?orientation_session}

action_nl_templates.reserve_specialty_for_slot: reserve specialty skill {?specialty_skill} for shift slot {?shift_slot}
action_nl_templates.release_specialty_from_slot: release specialty skill {?specialty_skill} from shift slot {?shift_slot}
action_nl_templates.reserve_support_skill_for_slot: reserve support skill {?support_skill} for shift slot {?shift_slot}

action_nl_templates.release_technical_skill_from_slot: release technical skill {?technical_skill} from shift slot {?shift_slot}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a shift slot or a nurse candidate or a clinical role or a support skill or a specialty skill or a technical skill or a orientation session or a clinical supervisor or a approval document type or a trainer or a special equipment or a credential or a staff role is also a object
Everything that is a preceptor role or a mentor role is also a staff role
Everything that is a day shift slot or a night shift slot is also a shift slot
